page_content:
CPSN230 College Park Scholars: International Studies - Internship Practicum (1-3 Credits)

Supervised internship project in an area related to international studies. Prerequisite: CPSN101.

Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars International Studies (CPSN) program.

CPSN240 College Park Scholars: International Studies - Service-Learning Practicum (1-3 Credits)

Supervised Service-Learning project in an area related to international studies.
